_comment: SLO/staleness rules for DishtaYantra. Copy to config/alerts.json, set alerts.enabled=true and alerts.rules_file=config/alerts.json. A rule BREACHES when the DAG (or named node) has had no OUTPUT CHANGE within max_age_seconds. Because of the equality gate this is output-change staleness: a constant-but-healthy stream will read as stale, so size max_age_seconds to the slowest legitimate change interval.
